nodes.label:
Highly Expressive Formalisms
(e.g., Higher-Order Logic)
- High Representational Power
- Low Tractability
- Complex Reasoning

Balanced Formalisms
(e.g., Frames, Predicate Logic)
- Moderate Power & Tractability

Highly Efficient Formalisms
(e.g., Propositional Logic, Production Rules)
- Low Representational Power
- High Tractability
- Simple & Fast Reasoning

visuals.title: The KR Trade-Off Spectrum
visuals.svgContent:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="420" height="350">
  <defs>
    <linearGradient id="bg" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="0%" y2="100%">
      <stop offset="0%" style="stop-color:#E3F2FD"/>
      <stop offset="100%" style="stop-color:#BBDEFB"/>
    </linearGradient>
  </defs>
  <rect width="420" height="350" fill="url(#bg)" rx="12"/>
  <text x="210" y="25" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="13" font-weight="bold" fill="#1565C0">Knowledge Representation Issues</text>

  <!-- Central Knowledge Representation Box -->
  <rect x="160" y="80" width="100" height="60" fill="#1565C0" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="210" y="115" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Knowledge Representation
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <!-- Ambiguity Issue -->
  <rect x="50" y="180" width="80" height="40" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="90" y="205" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Ambiguity
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <line x1="160" y1="110" x2="130" y2="180" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="1.5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </line>

  <!-- Incompleteness Issue -->
  <rect x="170" y="180" width="90" height="40" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="215" y="205" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Incompleteness
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <line x1="210" y1="140" x2="215" y2="180" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="1.5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </line>

  <!-- Inconsistency Issue -->
  <rect x="290" y="180" width="90" height="40" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.2s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="335" y="205" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Inconsistency
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.4s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <line x1="260" y1="110" x2="290" y2="180" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="1.5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </line>

  <!-- Scalability Issue -->
  <rect x="120" y="250" width="80" height="40" fill="#64B5F6" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="160" y="275" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Scalability
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.7s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <line x1="190" y1="140" x2="160" y2="250" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="1.5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </line>

  <!-- Expressiveness Issue -->
  <rect x="220" y="250" width="100" height="40" fill="#64B5F6" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="270" y="275" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Expressiveness
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <line x1="210" y1="140" x2="270" y2="250" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="1.5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.2s" fill="freeze"/>
  </line>
</svg>
